basic_details.job_title: ICDS Jashpur Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Integrated Child Development Services Jashpur (ICDS Jashpur)
basic_details.short_information: Integrated Child Development Services Jashpur (ICDS Jashpur) Anganwadi Helper Notification 2026 has been released on 20-05-2026 on the official website. Have been announced through the ICDS Jashpur Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged between 18 to 44 years who have passed 8th Class are eligible to apply for these Anganwadi Helper vacancies. The online application process for ICDS Jashpur Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026 has started on 20-05-2026 and will remain open until 04-06-2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply online through the direct links

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 44 years Age Relaxation: 3 years relaxation for experienced Sahayika/Sangathika with 1 or more years of service.

selection_process: Merit List based on educational marks and additional points Document Verification Provisional Evaluation Sheet with claim-objection
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Integrated Child Development Services Jashpur Anganwadi Helper Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 04-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Integrated Child Development Services Jashpur to complete the application.
